PostToolUse.name: Suggest test file when model created

hooks.message: New model file detected in models/. Consider generating a test skeleton: /odoo-test generate <model.name> --module /path/to/module

PostToolUse.name: Suggest test creation for new models directory

hooks.message:
New Odoo model file created! To auto-generate a test skeleton:
  /odoo-test generate <your.model.name> --module /path/to/module

Or run the script directly:
  python test_generator.py --model <your.model.name> --module /path/to/module

PostToolUse.name: Suggest running tests after manifest created

hooks.message:
Module manifest created/updated. To install and run tests:
  python -m odoo -c conf/project17.conf -d project17 --test-enable -i <module_name> --stop-after-init

Or use the plugin command:
  /odoo-test run <module_name> --config conf/project17.conf --database project17

PostToolUse.name: Suggest security tests for access control files

hooks.message:
Access control file (ir.model.access.csv) created/modified. Security tests recommended:

1. Test that users with correct groups CAN access records
2. Test that users WITHOUT groups CANNOT access records

Example pattern:
  def test_access_control(self):
      # User WITH permission
      self.env['my.model'].with_user(authorized_user).search([])
      # User WITHOUT permission
      with self.assertRaises(AccessError):
          self.env['my.model'].with_user(unauthorized_user).search([])

PostToolUse.name: Suggest tests after adding compute field

hooks.message:
If you added a computed field with @api.depends, add a test to verify:
  1. Initial computation on create
  2. Recomputation when dependency changes
  3. Stored value persists in database (if store=True)

Use /odoo-test generate to create a skeleton with compute field tests.

New test file created! Ensure tests/__init__.py imports it:

  # tests/__init__.py
  from . import test_my_module  # Add this line

Without this import, Odoo's test runner will NOT discover the test file.

PostToolUse.name: Suggest coverage check after test run

hooks.message:
Test file modified. After running tests, check coverage:
  /odoo-test coverage /path/to/module

Or with threshold gate (fails if below 80%):
  /odoo-test coverage /path/to/module --threshold 80

PostToolUse.name: Suggest HTTP test for new controller route
Warn on SavepointCase usage in modern Odoo

hooks.message:
If using SavepointCase: it was removed in Odoo 16+.
For Odoo 16-19: Use TransactionCase instead.
For partial rollback: Use self.env.cr.savepoint() context manager.

PostToolUse.name: Suggest update command after model changes

hooks.message:
Module source changed. Run update before tests:
  python -m odoo -c conf/project17.conf -d project17 -u <module_name> --stop-after-init
